final:
module RefModule (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input [1:0] shift_sel,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);

always @(*) begin
    case (shift_sel)
        2'b00: data_out = data_in;         // No shift
        2'b01: data_out = {data_in[2:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left by 1
        2'b10: data_out = {data_in[1:0], 2'b00}; // Shift left by 2
        2'b11: data_out = {1'b0, data_in[3:1]}; // Shift right by 1
        default: data_out = data_in;      // Default (should not occur)
    endcase
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
